Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: Fred Curry and Jesse Blount feud after they each file claims to the same mine.
Video.title: Feud at Dome Rock

Video.summary: An outlaw's daughter feels that her father was murdered unjustly and is bent on revenge.
Video.title: Girl with a Gun

Video.summary: Sante Fe faces an invasion by the American army and it's citizens are forced south.
Video.title: La Tules

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: The man Kit Carson saved from death in the desert turns out to be his wife's ex-fiance.
Video.title: Stubborn Mule Hill

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Diamond Jim Brady is traveling through Texas by railroad and waging wild bets along the way.
Video.title: Diamond Jim Brady

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: A father who raised a cold-hearted killer worries his younger son may turn out the same way.
Video.title: Deadly Decision

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: Wyatt Earp's brother Virgil masquerades as a bandit to gain access to an outlaw hide-out.
Video.title: Trial at Belle's Springs

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: Joseph Ridges has crafted an organ and is charged with bringing it safely to Salt Lake City.
Video.title: An Organ for Brother Brigham

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: While serving as scouts, Carson and Godey come across a man who lost everything in a Native raid.
Video.title: Samaritans, Mountain Style

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.
Video.title: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Image.alt: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Video.summary: An ex-convict is hired by Animas City to be their marshal.
Video.title: Halo for a Badman

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: Doc Holliday, looking for cash to finance his gambling, tries to con a banker out of $20,000.
Video.title: Doc Holiday's Gold Bars

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die

Video.summary: A rancher fights bandits.
Video.title: The Trouble with Taxes
